targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(project_number::text, department, 'N/A') AS "Tour",
  ROUND(duration::numeric, 2) AS "Duration"
FROM work_logs
WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
  AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
  AND duration IS NOT NULL
  AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
  AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
  AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
ORDER BY work_date DESC, duration DESC
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  bin_label AS "Bin",
  COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Frequency"
FROM (
  SELECT duration,
    CASE
      WHEN duration <= 2 THEN '≤ 2'
      WHEN duration <= 5.5 THEN '(2, 5.5]'
      WHEN duration <= 9 THEN '(5.5, 9]'
      WHEN duration <= 12.5 THEN '(9, 12.5]'
      WHEN duration <= 16 THEN '(12.5, 16]'
      WHEN duration <= 19.5 THEN '(16, 19.5]'
      WHEN duration <= 23 THEN '(19.5, 23]'
      WHEN duration <= 26.5 THEN '(23, 26.5]'
      WHEN duration <= 30 THEN '(26.5, 30]'
      ELSE '> 30'
    END AS bin_label,
    CASE
      WHEN duration <= 2 THEN 1
      WHEN duration <= 5.5 THEN 2
      WHEN duration <= 9 THEN 3
      WHEN duration <= 12.5 THEN 4
      WHEN duration <= 16 THEN 5
      WHEN duration <= 19.5 THEN 6
      WHEN duration <= 23 THEN 7
      WHEN duration <= 26.5 THEN 8
      WHEN duration <= 30 THEN 9
      ELSE 10
    END AS sort_order
  FROM work_logs
  WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
    AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
    AND duration IS NOT NULL
    AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
    AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
    AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
) sub
GROUP BY bin_label, sort_order
ORDER BY sort_order

list.label: Service
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT department FROM work_logs WHERE department IS NOT NULL ORDER BY department

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT activity_type FROM work_logs WHERE activity_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY activity_type

list.label: Employee
list.name: employee
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT employee_name FROM work_logs WHERE employee_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY employee_name
